category_sources: source_facts.description says it downloads MP3 files from Amazon's music store; official Google Code archive homepage is the project page.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is clamz; official Google Code archive uses the lowercase project id clamz.
docs_sources: Official archived Google Code project page is the best available official documentation surface for clamz.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; the official Google Code archive is an archived project/download page, not a current source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Amazon MP3 downloading; source_facts.executables lists the clamz CLI.
